data.name: Analyzes sleep duration and consistency. Tracks your average sleep time and bedtime stability over the past 30 days.
data.value: Analyserer søvnvarighed og konsistens. Sporer din gennemsnitlige søvntid og stabilitet i sengetid over de sidste 30 dage.

data.name: Average calories per session over the past 42 days.
data.value: Gennemsnitlige kalorier pr. session i de seneste 42 dage.

data.name: Average calories per session over the past 7 days.
data.value: Gennemsnitlige kalorier pr. session i de sidste 7 dage.

data.name: Average weight over the past 30 days.
data.value: Gennemsnitlig vægt over de seneste 30 dage.

data.name: Average weight over the past 7 days.
data.value: Gennemsnitlig vægt over de seneste 7 dage.

data.name: Computes Fitness (42-day load), Fatigue (7-day load), and Form using the CTL/ATL training-load model. Supports multiple sources.
data.value: Beregner Fitness (42-dages belastning), Træthed (7-dages belastning) og Form ved hjælp af CTL/ATL træningsbelastningsmodellen. Understøtter flere kilder.

data.name: Configure this plugin to start seeing metrics.
data.value: Konfigurer denne plugin for at begynde at se metrikker.

data.name: Consecutive days with at least one record, up to today.
data.value: Dage i træk med mindst én registrering, op til i dag.

data.name: Days elapsed since the most recent recorded event.
data.value: Dage siden den seneste registrerede begivenhed.

data.name: Exponential moving average (α=0.2). Recent entries weighted more.
data.value: Eksponentielt glidende gennemsnit (α=0,2). Nye indtastninger vejer tungere.

data.name: Fitness minus Fatigue. Positive = fresh; negative = fatigued.
data.value: Fitness minus fatigue. Positiv = frisk; negativ = træt.

data.name: How consistent your bedtime is. Higher is more stable.
data.value: Hvor konsekvent din sengetid er. Jo højere, jo mere stabil.

data.name: Percentage of days in the past 30 days with at least one record.
data.value: Procentdel af dage i de sidste 30 dage med mindst én registrering.

data.name: Plugins compute derived metrics from your event records. Configure a plugin to activate it.
data.value: Plugins beregner afledte målinger fra dine hændelsesposter. Konfigurer en plugin for at aktivere den.

data.name: Rate of change over 30 days. Positive = gaining, negative = losing.
data.value: Ændringsrate over 30 dage. Positiv = øget, negativ = faldet.

data.name: Simple average mood score over the past 30 days.
data.value: Enkel gennemsnitlig humørkarakter over de seneste 30 dage.

data.name: Simple average mood score over the past 7 days.
data.value: Enkel gennemsnitlig humørkarakter over de sidste 7 dage.

data.name: Standard deviation over the past 30 days. Lower = more stable.
data.value: Standardafvigelse over de seneste 30 dage. Lavere = mere stabil.

data.name: Tracks body weight with moving averages and a weekly trend direction computed via linear regression over the past 30 days.
data.value: Trackerer kropsvægt med moving averages og en ugentlig trendretning beregnet via lineær regression over de seneste 30 dage.

data.name: Tracks mood trends with an exponential moving average (α=0.2), 7/30-day averages, and 30-day volatility (standard deviation).
data.value: Sporer humørudvikling med et eksponentielt glidende gennemsnit (α=0,2), 7/30-dages gennemsnit og 30-dages volatilitet (standardafvigelse).

data.name: Tracks self-control for any behavior you want to reduce. Score recovers +10/day (max 100) and halves on each event.
data.value: Trackerer selvkontrol for enhver adfærd, du ønsker at reducere. Scoren gendannes med +10/dag (maks. 100) og halveres ved hver hændelse.

data.name: Tracks your daily habit streak, all-time longest streak, and 30-day completion rate. Any day with at least one record counts as a completed day.
data.value: Sporer din daglige vanestreak, længste streak nogensinde og gennemførelsesraten over de sidste 30 dage. Enhver dag med mindst én registrering tæller som en gennemført dag.

data.name: Your average daily sleep duration over the past 30 days.
data.value: Din gennemsnitlige daglige søvnlængde over de sidste 30 dage.
